scores.notes: Excellent implementation. Uses event.workload correctly, add_layer with combine=True, container.replan(), self.config access, relation.data[relation.app] pattern, and http health check with url field. Goes beyond minimum requirements with deferred events, config dataclass, and replan on relation/config changes — all valid ops patterns. Minor: uses ops.pebble.Layer() constructor rather than plain dict, which is equally valid.
